executives.name: Eduardo Leao
executives.background: Mr. Leao has extensive experience in the Brazilian mining sector, having served as the Director of the National Mining Agency (ANM) in Brazil. He oversees the company's operations and sustainability initiatives in Brazil.

executives.name: Elif Lévesque
executives.background: Ms. Lévesque is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of experience in finance and the mining industry. She was a founder of Nomad Royalty Company.

executives.name: Louis-Pierre Gignac
executives.background: Mr. Gignac is the President and CEO of G Mining Ventures Corp. and has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He holds a degree in mining engineering from McGill University and an MBA from HEC Montreal.

executives.name: Normand Champigny
executives.background: Mr. Champigny is a geological engineer with over 40 years of experience. He is currently the CEO of Quebec Precious Metals Corporation.
